title: Intelligence (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:IntelOperative-HaL.jpg|thumb|right|250px|An [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] intelligence operative]]
'''Intelligence''' refers to organizations that conducted espionage activities including counter-intelligence, foreign intelligence, and military intelligence:

==Canon==
===Galactic Republic===
*'''[[Republic Intelligence]]''' of the [[Republic Military]]
**'''[[Clone Intelligence]]''' of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]]
**'''[[Republic Naval Intelligence]]''' of the [[Republic Navy]]
*'''[[Senate Bureau of Intelligence]]''' of the [[Galactic Senate]]

===Galactic Empire===
*'''[[Imperial Intelligence]]''' of the [[Ubiqtorate]] and [[Imperial Military]]
**'''[[Imperial Army Intelligence]]''' of the [[Imperial Army]]
**'''[[Naval Intelligence Agency]]''' of the [[Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Imperial Security Bureau]]''' of the [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order]]

===Alliance to Restore the Republic===
*'''[[Rebel Alliance Intelligence Service]]''' of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Bothan Spynet]]''' of the Alliance to Restore the Republic

===New Republic===
*'''[[New Republic Intelligence]]''' of the [[New Republic]]
*'''[[New Republic Security Bureau]]''' of the New Republic

===Resistance===
*'''[[Resistance Intelligence]]''' of the [[Resistance]]

===First Order===
*'''[[First Order Security Bureau]]''' of the [[First Order]]

==Legends==
===Galactic Republic===
*'''[[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]]''' of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
**'''[[Clone Intelligence/Legends|Clone Intelligence]]''' of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]
**'''[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]''' of the Grand Army of the Republic
*'''[[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]]''' of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]
*'''[[Republic Strategic Information Service]]''' of the Galactic Republic during the [[Great Galactic War]]/[[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]]
*'''[[Republic Security Organization]]'''
*'''[[Special Acquisitions Branch]]'''
*'''[[Interstellar Consortium on Technology]]'''

===Sith Empire/Galactic Empire===
*'''[[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]''' of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*'''[[Imperial Intelligence (Sith Empire)|Imperial Intelligence]]''' of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
**'''[[Sith Intelligence]]''', successor to Imperial Intelligence of the Sith Empire
*'''[[Imperial Navy Intelligence]]''' of the Galactic [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]''' of the Galactic Empire
*'''[[Sith Intelligence and Assassination]]''' agency of the [[One Sith]]

===Rebel Alliance/New Republic===
*'[[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|''Alliance Intelligence''']] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
**'''[[Sector Intelligence]]''' branches of Alliance Intelligence
*'''[[Fleet Intelligence (Alliance to Restore the Republic)|Rebel Alliance Fleet Intelligence]]'''
*'''[[New Republic Intelligence Service]]''' of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[New Republic Fleet Intelligence]]''' of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]

===Galactic Alliance===
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service]]''' of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Fleet Intelligence]]''' of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Guard]]'''
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Security]]'''

===Law enforcement===
*'''[[Anti-Terrorism Unit]]''' of the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]]
*'''[[Organized Crime Unit]]''' of the Coruscant Security Force
*'''[[CorSec Intelligence]]''' of the [[Corellian Security Force]]

===Others===
*'''[[Alliance Intelligence (Eternal Alliance)|Alliance Intelligence]]''' of the [[Eternal Alliance]]
*'''[[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]]/[[Martial Intelligence Division|Bothan Intelligence]]''' of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]]
*'''[[Centrality Intelligence]]''' of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]
*'''[[Chiss Intelligence]]''' of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]
*'''[[Corellian Intelligence]]''' of the planet [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*'''[[Daimar Intelligence]]''' of the planet [[Daimar]]
*'''[[Militia Intelligence]]''' of the [[Cularin Militia]]
*'''[[Royal Intelligence Service]]''' of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]
*'''[[RSF Intelligence Division]]''' of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]
*'''[[Thaereian Intelligence]]''' of the [[Thaereian military]]

==See also==
*[[Chief of Intelligence (disambiguation)]]

==External link==
